legal.securityDesc: The architectural blueprint governing data integrity, secure control, and mission-critical safety across the KGMAO system.
legal.blueprintDesc: Full diagnostic architecture documentation available for Enterprise Tier partners.

encryption.title: Encryption System
encryption.desc: All data and diagnostic traffic is secured via end-to-end AES-256 encryption layers, ensuring data integrity across global clusters.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge Storage
zeroKnowledge.desc: KGMAO engineers do not have raw access to tenant data. All operational logs are hashed and stored in secure ledger locations.

identity.title: Identity Adminty
identity.desc: GDPR-compliant identity management. We utilize biometric data and multi-factor authentication for mission-critical authorization.

iso.title: ISO-27001 Certified
iso.desc: Our infrastructure adheres to international security standards, with quarterly diagnostic audits and real-time threat detection.

s1.title: 01. Handshake Cryptographique
s1.desc: Chaque appareil se connectant au KGMAO IoT Edge doit subir un handshake cryptographique en plusieurs étapes. Les clés Advanced Encryption sont renouvelées toutes les 24 heures de fonctionnement pour empêcher les attaques par rejoue sur la données en direct des capteurs.

s2.title: 02. Clôture de Données Géographiques
s2.desc: La souveraineté est maintenue grâce à l'isolation des clusters régionaux. Les données générées dans les nœuds EMEA restent dans les clusters de juridiction européens, sauf si elles sont explicitement reliées via une autorisation admin multi-signature.

s3.title: 03. Processe de Réponse aux Incidents
s3.desc: En cas d'anomalie détectée, le moteur IA de KGMAO déclenche automatiquement une 'Quarantaine de Cluster'. Les nœuds suspects sont isolés du lien smart jusqu'à ce qu'une autorisation détaillé soit accordée par notre équipe de sécurité.

s1.title: 01. Secure Handshake
s1.desc: Every device connecting to the KGMAO IoT Edge must undergo a multi-stage secure handshake. Advanced Encryption keys are rotated every 24 operating hours to prevent replay attacks on sensor data.

s2.title: 02. Geographic Data Fencing
s2.desc: Adminty is maintained through regional cluster isolation. Data generated in EMEA locations stays within European jurisdiction clusters unless explicitly bridged via multi-signature admin authorization.

s3.title: 03. Incident Response Process
s3.desc: In the event of a detected anomaly, the KGMAO AI Engine automatically triggers a 'Cluster Quarantine'. Suspicious locations are isolated from the smart link until diagnostic clearance is granted by our security team.

legal.slaSubtitle: The KGMAO Guarantee: Mission-critical business uptime backed by redundant infrastructure and diagnostic response processs.

c1.title: 1. Performance Guarantee
c1.desc: KGMAO guarantees an annual uptime percentage of at least 99.98% for all core SaaS modules, including Asset Monitoring, IoT Twin synchronization, and Predictive Diagnostics. Our global distribution ensures that even under massive regional stress, your local location remains synchronized.

c2.title: 2. Data Availability Variance
c2.desc: Data data is triple-replicated across geographic clusters. In the event of a cluster failure, our 'Omega Sync' process automatically routes traffic to the nearest secondary location within 400ms, ensuring non-stop business analytics.

credits.title: SLA Credits
credits.desc: If we fail to meet our uptime guarantee, your account is credited with 'Business Resilience Credits' automatically applied to your next billing cycle.

privacy.subtitle: Documenting the diagnostic management of business data and personnel identity security within the KGMAO system.

encryption.title: Encryption Core
encryption.desc: End-to-end AES-256 encryption for all data and diagnostic traffic across regional centers.

zeroVision.title: Zero Vision
zeroVision.desc: Our engineers never view raw operational logs without explicit multi-signature tenant consent.

identity.title: Identity Capture Processs
identity.p1: We collect minimal professional identity data (Deep Identity) required for mission-critical authentication. This includes corporate email identifiers, biometric data (optional for safety permits), and geographic access logs.
identity.p2: We do not aggregate personal behavioral data for advertising or 3rd party commoditization. Your privacy is a fundamental parameter of our business stability.

telemetry.title: Data Retention
telemetry.p1: Business sensor data is retained based on your enterprise tier's archiving policy (typically 7 to 25 years). Diagnostic audit logs are stored in secure blockchain ledger locations to ensure non-repudiation of safety events.
telemetry.p2: Data transmission across international borders is governed by the specific subscription tier and regional cluster selected during onboarding.

privacy.footer: KGMAO PRIVACY NOTICE © 2026. YOUR DATA IS PROTECTED.

terms.frameworkDesc: Legal framework governed by high-court business processs.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Processs
acceptance.p1: By initializing a session on the KGMAO platform, you explicitly agree to adhere to these governance processs. Our system is an enterprise-grade business suite; use without explicit authorization or beyond the defined operational scope is strictly prohibited.
acceptance.p2: These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between your Enterprise Entity and Kalide Global Business Suite.

sovereignty.title: Data Adminty
sovereignty.p1: All data data, asset snapshots, and diagnostic reports remains the metadata property of the respective tenant. However, KGMAO retains a non-exclusive license to process such data for predictive algorithm training and diagnostic stabilization of the overall system.
sovereignty.p2: Data transmission across international borders is governed by the specific subscription tier and regional cluster selected during onboarding.

ip.title: Intellectual Property System
ip.p1: The KGMAO source core, UI/UX aesthetics, and proprietary diagnostic models are the sole intellectual property of Kalide Global. Any attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or bypass the security encryption layers will trigger an immediate termination sequence and legal audit.

sla.title: SLA Agreement
sla.subtitle: The KGMAO Guarantee: Mission-critical business uptime backed by redundant infrastructure and diagnostic response processs.

c1.title: 1. Performance Guarantee
c1.desc: KGMAO guarantees an annual uptime percentage of at least 99.98% for all core SaaS modules, including Asset Monitoring, IoT Twin synchronization, and Predictive Diagnostics. Our global distribution ensures that even under massive regional stress, your local location remains synchronized.

c2.title: 2. Data Availability Variance
c2.desc: Data data is triple-replicated across geographic clusters. In the event of a cluster failure, our 'Omega Sync' process automatically routes traffic to the nearest secondary location within 400ms, ensuring non-stop business analytics.

credits.title: SLA Credits
credits.desc: If we fail to meet our uptime guarantee, your account is credited with 'Business Resilience Credits' automatically applied to your next billing cycle.

security.toast: Security officer will contact you on secure comms.
